reason: No out-of-time validation window exists: classes with data (2019-2021) have almost no covered training history before them and still-censored career outcomes. Any measured lift would be unvalidatable.
revisit_when: 2019-2021 classes reach ~5 years of Career AV (around 2026-2027 data refreshes) AND at least 3 covered classes can serve as training for a later test class; earliest honest test window is roughly test years 2024+ evaluated in 2029+.
alternative_paths: collegefootballdata.com API (needs key) may extend season-level stats further back
team-share/dominator features need full-team totals, also 2014+ only
